history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right with open floor ahead. The goal is down and to the right, and moving forward is a safe step that brings me closer while avoiding the lava below my current path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right and the cell ahead is open. Continuing forward moves me closer to the goal while staying safely away from the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the right side facing a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The goal is below me, so I should turn right to face down toward the path leading to it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is empty floor. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal without stepping onto lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly below me, and moving forward will reach it safely since the cell beneath is the goal, not lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
